title: thelypteris micans
intro: Thelypteris micans, also known as the shimmering fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris micans include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
